name: www.newburghhealthcarecenter.com
message: [AI generated] Newburgh Healthcare Center is a healthcare facility located in Newburgh, Indiana, USA. It provides a wide range of health services including advanced medical care, physical therapy, occupational therapy, speech therapy, and specialized memory care. Beyond medical treatment, the center also offers various activities for social engagement and wellness. They are committed to creating a comfortable, supportive, and nurturing environment for residents.
